allow: PowerShell(foreach \($c in 'node','npm','cargo','rustc','winget'\) { $cmd = Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($cmd\) { try { $v = \(& $c --version\) -join ' ' } catch { $v = '\(falhou\)' }; "$c : $v -> $\($cmd.Source\)" } else { "$c : NAO ENCONTRADO" } })

PowerShell($cargo = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin\\cargo.exe"; $rustup = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin\\rustup.exe"; if \(Test-Path $cargo\) { "CARGO: " + \(& $cargo --version\); "RUSTC: " + \(& "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin\\rustc.exe" --version\); "--- rustup show ---"; & $rustup show } else { "cargo NAO encontrado em $env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin" })
PowerShell("Instancia anterior encerrada \(para liberar o .exe para o rebuild\).")

PowerShell(Start-Process -FilePath ".\\src-tauri\\target\\release\\hld-controle.exe"; "App reaberto."; Get-Item ".\\src-tauri\\target\\release\\bundle\\nsis\\HLD Controle_0.1.0_x64-setup.exe" | Select-Object Name, LastWriteTime, @{n='MB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,2\)}} | Format-List)
PowerShell($env:Path = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin;$env:Path"; Get-Process hld-controle -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; npm run tauri build)
